title: StatusPreflightReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``status-preflight`` (WS5 #3).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries one ``SubResult`` per fanned-out sub-call;
skipped sub-calls appear as ``null`` so consumers can introspect uniformly.

The ``overall`` semantics here is simpler than submit-preflight (no
validate-campaign warn band): ``fail`` if any non-skipped sub-call
returned ``ok: false``; else ``pass``. The composite itself emits
``ok: true`` at the outer envelope — sub-failures surface via
``overall`` so partial results are preserved.

SubResult.description: One sub-call's outcome — verbatim envelope + elapsed wall-clock + ``ok`` mirror. Skipped sub-calls show as ``null`` at the parent (not a SubResult with ``ok: false``) so a re-run can target only the missing piece.
SubResult.title: SubResult
